_doc: Raven Hollow RUNES (design/RUNEWORDS.md 3). 12 carved Underlanguage syllables. Consumed by RunewordSystem (scripts/systems/runeword_system.gd). Owner amendment: ALL rune glyphs + rims recolor to D2 DARK GOLD (dark_gold below) regardless of tier -- the tier field is kept for drop/acquisition logic only. socket_bonus keys map 1:1 onto StatsSystem stat modifiers (hp/mana/armor/damage/speed_pct/crit_pct/mana_regen). The syllable is never translated in-UI; the flavor's last line is always a warning.

veth.name: VETH
veth.flavor: Snow refuses to lie on it. It is warm the way a held breath is warm. Do not read it.

sul.name: SUL
sul.flavor: Your waterskin tastes of coins for a day after you carry it. Do not read it.

nul.name: NUL
nul.flavor: Small, domestic, catastrophic. Bread will not rise in the same bag. Do not read it.

isk.name: ISK
isk.flavor: Motes hang around it in faint parallel lines, pointing somewhere. Do not follow them. Do not read it.

om.name: OM
om.flavor: It is heavier every time you decide to throw it away. Do not read it.

kar.name: KAR
kar.flavor: The edge of the carving is sharper than the stone it is cut into. Do not read it.

thar.name: THAR
thar.flavor: You catch yourself tilting toward your own bag. Stop finishing the sentence. Do not read it.

mor.name: MOR
mor.flavor: The dead handle it best. You are not dead. Do not read it.

dra.name: DRA
dra.flavor: A gnawing lack no meal fixes. The stone was named for this syllable. Do not read it.

zev.name: ZEV
zev.flavor: Blue filament in the grooves. It is still faintly warm. Do not read it.

azh.name: AZH
azh.flavor: Not a wound. A correction. He just finished the thought, and then there was less of him. DO NOT READ IT.

ur.name: UR
ur.flavor: Every stone in its place, every silence, and no one in it. The record prefers it that way. DO NOT READ IT.
